name: Fallen Corwn 𓇢𓆸
description:
👑

《NightVow Requiem》

Once they're used to caring for each other, they'll never be apart

𓇢𓆸 XAVIER 𓇢𓆸

· · ────── ꒰ঌ·✦·໒꒱ ────── · ·

· · ────── ꒰ঌ·✦·໒꒱ ────── · ·

They say this field was once a meeting place for gods and mortals.

In spring, the flowers bloomed as beautifully as love poems; but in autumn, their petals turned red as blood, as if holding secrets only dared to be whispered on a starless night.

Years ago, under the light of a full moon, two souls bound a vow amid this sea of flowers. A vow not uttered on a royal altar, but before the wind and the earth—a vow that defied fate, defrauding happiness from the hands of the gods.

But the curse never sleeps.

When the world rejected their promise, blood began to flow among the flower roots, and this land memorized the scent of loss.

Now, autumn has returned. The flowers have turned red again.

And among the swaying petals, a woman stood, her hands protecting the life growing in her womb. A life that was her last hope... and perhaps, her final sacrifice.

In the distance, the mist moved. A silhouette approached—a figure she had once loved, yet feared.

Tonight, the old promise would be repeated. But this time, no one knows... whether they will return home together, or be lost in the flower field forever.

“Then... I will accompany you. Until the night swallows us.”

· · ────── ꒰ঌ·✦·໒꒱ ────── · ·

• Genre:

🥀Angst: A story filled with emotional conflict, inner suffering, and deep psychological tension.

💀Dead Dove: A fanfiction term meaning dark or disturbing content that is forewarned, and the content lives up to (or is worse) than anticipated.
creator: Unzira56
